opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is pounding out of my chest, I can't stop shaking, and if I stand up I feel like I am going to have a stroke.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse over the last two days and I'm terrified something is really wrong with my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two days ago it suddenly got much worse
symptom_narrative.duration: the last 48 hours, but I've had milder versions on and off for a couple of years
symptom_narrative.character: a pounding, racing heartbeat with whole-body shaking and a rush like way too much adrenaline
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe — when I stand I feel like I'm about to have a stroke or a heart attack
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest where my heart is, and the shaking is all over my body
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it comes on within seconds of standing up and settles once I lie back down flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying completely flat and staying still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up, or lifting my head up higher than my heart
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling faint, a surge of panic, and I'm completely wiped out and exhausted after an episode
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had episodes like this before but never this bad — a specialist told me a while ago that my nervous system doesn't control my heart rate and blood pressure properly when I stand
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, too scared to stand up, and I live on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a problem with my nervous system that makes my heart race and my blood pressure jump when I stand up
past_medical_history.how_managed: mostly just managing it myself day to day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone; I haven't changed my caffeine recently, haven't taken any cold-and-flu decongestants, and I don't use any recreational drugs. This episode has really frightened me.

objective_data_offered.value: about 75 beats per minute lying down, jumping to around 140 when I stand up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer smartwatch, single readings, not a clinical monitor

objective_data_offered.value: my hands and my whole body won't stop trembling and my face feels hot and flushed
